enchants.name: Freezing Regeneration
enchants.effects: Increases Life regen by 6 per second, Doubled Out of comabt OnHit below 40% HP: gain 85 hp/s Healing for 2 seconds, 20 Second Cooldown

enchants.name: Frost Barrier
enchants.effects: +3% Dmg Reduction OnHit below 80% HP: +5 Defense & Armored for 4 seconds, 20 Second Cooldown

enchants.name: Permafrost Magic

enchants.name: Snow Golems
enchants.effects: 6% Ability Cost Reduction OnAbility: snow golem to follow you, attacking nearby enemies and inflicting slowed on them. The golem lasts for 8 seconds. 10 second cooldown.

enchants.name: Eternal Restoration
enchants.effects: Increases Life regen by 8 per second, Doubled Out of comabt Increases Mana regen by 4 per second, Doubled Out of comabt

enchants.name: Razor Shards
enchants.effects: +3% Weapon Damage On Shoot: fire 2 ice shards that deal 35 Armor piercing damage each and pierce enemies (0.4 second cooldown)

enchants.name: Ancient Artifacts
enchants.effects: +3 DEX, +3 DEF, +3 SPD Summon the artifacts of the Ancient Gods. Pyramid Artifact weakens nearby enemies Nile artifact heals 20 hp/s Sphinx artifact deals 275 Damage per second to nearby enemies.

enchants.name: Apitoxin
enchants.effects: Fires a poison towards your cursor every second, this poison does 350 damage over 3 seconds with a radius of 2.5. This poison scales off of wisdom, gaining 20 damage per wisdom, and 0.1 radius every 5 wisdom over 50.

enchants.name: Artificial Core
enchants.effects: Changes the weapons attack to fire 6 converging bullets at 65% fire rate. These bullets armor pierce and deal 50-70 damage each.

enchants.name: Bone Claws
enchants.effects: Changes the weapon attack to fire two bleeding shots at 70% rate of fire. The shots deal 70-105 damage and inflict a 30/s damage bleed for 3 seconds.

enchants.name: Buzzing Bullets
enchants.effects: Unleash the wrath of Bees with your attacks. Adding a burst of bee bullets that each deal 60 armor piercing damage.

enchants.name: Crystalline Channel
enchants.effects: +66% DEX of Bonus WIS +66% WIS of Bonus DEX.

enchants.name: Crystal Shards
enchants.effects: 20% Chance on Shoot to spawn a crystal shard that explodes after a delay. The shards explode into 3 armor piercing shots that each deal 300-400 Damage. Cooldown 0.8 seconds.

enchants.name: Draconic Gaze
enchants.effects: +50 MP On ability use, gain Damaging for 2 seconds, 5 second cooldown.

enchants.name: Drake Warden
enchants.effects: +40 HP, +2 ATT On Ability use: Summon a random Drake follower , Cooldown 30 seconds.

enchants.name: El Dorado’s Legacy
enchants.effects: +120 Max MP, +2 DEX, +2 WIS On hit, 50% chance to restore 25 MP, 2.5 second cooldown.

enchants.name: Eye of the Spider
enchants.effects: +50 Max HP, +5 DEX On ability use, fire a massive web ball for 800 damage and inflict 8s Slowed, 16 second cooldown.

enchants.name: Fractured Blade
enchants.effects: Changes the weapon attack to fire an additional two shots splitting from the main shot 3 tiles away. These shots armor pierce and deal 30-45 Damage. The main shot additionally gains piercing.

enchants.name: Hellfire Edge
enchants.effects: +33% DEX of bonus VIT 3 hellfire slashes fire in a much tighter cone for 105-125 damage.

enchants.name: High Voltage
enchants.effects: Fires a lightning blast every second. This blast deals 200 damage to up to 2 targets with the first target taking a shockblast for 40 damage. This blast scales off wisdom, gaining 5 total damage per wisdom and gaining a target every 30 wis over 50.

enchants.name: Infernal Anger
enchants.effects: Gain 6 Attack and take 5% less damage. On shoot while above 70% HP inflict bleeding and sickness on yourself. On shoot while at or below 70% HP gain an additional 20% Damage Resistance.

enchants.name: Kogbold Spirit
enchants.effects: -5 DEF When shooting while above 90% HP, gain +4 DEX and +4 ATT for 1 second.

enchants.name: Living Hive
enchants.effects: +60 HP and +5 SPD Release bees on when hit for more than 40 damage, cooldown 2 seconds.

enchants.name: Molecular Blade
enchants.effects: Changes the weapon attack to fire two Armor Piercing shots, one main shot dealing 180-235 shot at 100% fire rate, and another small shot dealing 30-55 damage at 150% fire rate.

enchants.name: Necrotic Knowledge
enchants.effects: 10% Ability Cost Reduction Increases Wisdom by 20% of Bonus Wisdom.

enchants.name: Night’s Soul
enchants.effects: Gain 20 HP and MP and 2 of every other stat. Gain 2% Loot, Dust and XP Bonus.

enchants.name: Night’s Strength
enchants.effects: Gain +4.5% Weapon Damage and Fire Rate.

enchants.name: Night’s Tenacity
enchants.effects: Reduce incoming damage by 5%, gain 20 Maximum Health.

enchants.name: Night’s Wisdom
enchants.effects: Reduces MP cost by 10%, Gain 3 Wisdom and 3 Defense.

enchants.name: Raijin’s Dance
enchants.effects: On ability use, call lightning dealing 450 Damage across 3 targets.

enchants.name: Soulful Mastery
enchants.effects: +33% ATT of bonus WIS +33% WIS of Bonus ATT Soul arrows deal 1111 base damage at 18% rate of fire and travel further.

enchants.name: Swarm Tree’s Wrath
enchants.effects: Adds a burst of insects to the sides of the main pattern, these bullets deal 25 armor piercing damage each.

enchants.name: The King’s Treasure
enchants.effects: +80 Max HP Shooting below 25% HP will gain +8 ATT, +8 DEF for 8s.

enchants.name: Thornswarm
enchants.effects: Engulf enemies in a torrent of rapid armor-piercing thorns at 170% rate of fire.

enchants.name: Venom Coating
enchants.effects: Envenomed shots now inflict 4s of Bleeding for 12 damage per second.

enchants.name: Bar Brawler
enchants.effects: Gain Attack equal to 15% of bonus Vitality. Now fires a combo string of shots, with the main shots dealing 300-400 damage, increasing to 350-450 damage later in the combo, and the finisher dealing 975-1350 damage.

enchants.name: Consuming Void
enchants.effects: Fires a massive slow moving shot at 15% rate of fire that pierces and deals 700-800 damage. Additionally fires two more shots that deal 50-60 damage.

enchants.name: Coral Volley
enchants.effects: Gain 5 Dexterity. Fire a varying volley of additional arrows that deal 10-20 armor piercing damage.

enchants.name: Cursebearer
enchants.effects: Now always curses on ability use. When cursed gain 10 Def, 10 Wisdom, and a 20 hp/s healing buff on shoot. Additionally increases weapon damage by 5%.

enchants.name: N.O.V.A.
enchants.effects: Gain 5 Wisdom. On Enemy Hit unleashes an energy blast | firing 10 shots that deal 40 damage plus 1 additional damage every 2 Wisdom over 50. Cooldown 1 second.

enchants.name: Spellsword Mastery
enchants.effects: Gain 5 Wisdom and Dexterity equal to 10% of bonus Wisdom, the Rapier’s Lunge now triggers every 3 shots instead of 5.
